revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24699703697|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Expand Japanese|波久奴神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hakunu Shrine | native_name = 波久奴神社 | image = Hakunu-jinja.JPG | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hakunu Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.454516|136.290635}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Takamimusubi|qid=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi|de|Takamimusubi|en|Takamimusubi|es|Takami-musubi-no-kami|fa|تاکامیموسوبی|fr|Takamimusubi|id|Takamimusubi|ja|タカミムスヒ|ks|تاکامِمُسُبی|pl|Takamimusubi|ru|Такамимусуби-но ками|zh|高皇產靈尊|qid=Q125400|1=Takamimusubi}} }} {{nihongo|'''Hakunu Shrine'''|波久奴神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11638477|ltq=Q11638477|qid=Q11638477|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province}} ** Series ordinal: 56 ** P155: {{ill|Yutsukino Shrine|lt=Yutsukino Shrine|qid=Q135039823|1=Yutsukino Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135039824|ltq=Q135039824|qid=Q135039824|1=Woeno Shrine (Q135039824)}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q844130|ltq=Q844130|qid=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}} * {{ill|Ōmi Province|lt=Ōmi Province|ca|Província d'Ōmi|ckb|پارێزگای ئۆمی|cs|Provincie Ómi|de|Provinz Ōmi|en|Ōmi Province|es|Provincia de Ōmi|fa|ولایت اومی|fi|Ōmin provinssi|fr|Province d'Ōmi|gl|Provincia de Ōmi|hak|Ōmi-koet|id|Provinsi Ōmi|it|Ōmi|ja|近江国|ko|오미국|lt|Omio žemė|nl|Omi (provincie)|pl|Prowincja Ōmi|pt|Província de Ōmi|ru|Оми (провинция)|simple|Ōmi Province|sk|Ómi (provincia)|sr|Провинција Оми|tr|Ōmi (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Омі|vi|Tỉnh Ōmi|zh_min_nan|Ômi-kok|zh_yue|近江國|zh|近江國|qid=Q843882|1=Ōmi Province}} * {{ill|Q4832118|ltq=Q4832118|qid=Q4832118|1=Azai District, Ōmi}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.454516|136.290635}} == image (P18) == * Hakunu-jinja.JPG == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q125400|ltq=Q125400|qid=Q125400|1=Takamimusubi}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181836 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Gō-sha|lt=Gō-sha|ja|郷社|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == architectural style (P149) == * {{ill|Q210684|ltq=Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} == country (P17) == * ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * はくぬじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 7160005004065 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市高畑町296', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:波久奴神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11555428}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Hakunu Shrine |画像 = [[ファイル:Hakunu-jinja.JPG|270px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|qid=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|qid=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}} Takahata-chō 296 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|16.7|N|136|17|26.2|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi|1=Takamimusubi}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (minor)
former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|lt=three-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 3|Q2509|qid=Q2509|1=April 3}} |神事 = Ōyugama Festival ({{ill|lt=July 3|Q2699|qid=Q2699|1=July 3}})
Tōmyō Festival ({{ill|lt=September 3|Q2860|qid=Q2860|1=September 3}}) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Hakunu Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Hakunu Shrine''' (はくぬじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Takahata-chō, {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|qid=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|qid=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}, and its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qid=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Enshrined deity === With {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi|1=Takamimusubi}} as the principal deity, it also enshrines {{ill|lt=Mononobe no Moriya|Q2424736|qid=Q2424736|lt=Mononobe no Moriya Ōmuraji|1=Mononobe no Moriya}}. === Shrine crest === * Umebachi === History === Details of the founding of the principal deity are unknown. According to shrine tradition for the associated deity Mononobe no Moriya Ōmuraji, after losing to {{ill|lt=Soga no Umako|Q1191233|qid=Q1191233|1=Soga no Umako}} in {{ill|lt=587|Q30891|qid=Q30891|1=587}} (Yōmei 2), he fled with Urushibe Kosaka to this area, his own territory. To evade pursuit by the {{ill|lt=Soga clan|Q909854|qid=Q909854|1=Soga clan}}, he hid in a cave in the eastern gorge of Kotani-yama in October of that same year, then built a grass hut in a place thick with {{ill|lt=bush clover|Q413694|qid=Q413694|1=Hagi}} in Takahata, took the name Hagio no Okina, and instructed local people. After his death, villagers built a {{ill|lt=hokora|Q1442984|qid=Q1442984|1=Hokora}} in memory of his virtue and revered him as "Senior First Rank Hagino Daimyōjin." In {{ill|lt=1881|Q7808|qid=Q7808|1=1881}} (Meiji 14), it was ranked gōsha; in Meiji 34, Mononobe no Moriya Ōmuraji was {{ill|lt=merged enshrinement|Q11412524|qid=Q11412524|lt=enshrined together|1=Co-Enshrinement}} and shrine buildings were organized; in Meiji 41 it received designation as a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shinsen Heihaku-ryō Kyōshinsha|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival: April 3 * Ōyugama Festival: July 3 * Tōmyō Festival: September 3 === Precinct shrine === * Tane Shrine === Cultural property === * Mikoshi (1 unit) - made in {{ill|lt=1768|Q7675|qid=Q7675|1=1768}} (Meiwa 5) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1065 波久奴神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Hakunu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hakunu Shrine]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nagahama, Shiga]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:Mononobe no Moriya]]
